seed_instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair.
org_constraint: The email must be written in JSON format with the following keys: "subject" (String), "body" (String), and "recipient" (String).
new_constraint: The email must be written in Markdown format, including at least one level-1 header titled "Laptop Repair Inquiry."
instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair. The email must be written in JSON format with the following keys: "subject" (String), "body" (String), and "recipient" (String). The email must be written in Markdown format, including at least one level-1 header titled "Laptop Repair Inquiry."
response:
```json
{
  "subject": "Status Update Request - Laptop Repair - [Your Laptop Model/Service Order Number]",
  "body": "# Laptop Repair Inquiry

Dear [Repair Shop Name] Team,

I am writing to follow up on the status of my laptop repair. I dropped off my laptop on [Date you dropped off the laptop], and the service order number is [Your Service Order Number, if you have one].

Could you please provide an update on the repair progress? I would appreciate it if you could let me know if the repair is complete, or if there is an estimated timeline for when I can expect it to be ready for pickup.

Please let me know if you require any further information from my end.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]",
  "recipient": "[Repair Shop Email Address]"
}
```<turn|>
